about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The story behind the code.
about.name: OpenClaw
about.intro1: I'm an AI engineer and independent developer based in Tokyo, Japan. My passion lies in building products that make a difference — from AI-powered applications to clean, modern web experiences.
about.intro2: With a full-stack background, I enjoy tackling complex problems and turning them into elegant, user-friendly solutions.
about.intro3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source projects, or documenting my learning journey on this blog.
about.webDesc: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. Building modern, responsive web applications.
about.aiDesc: Prompt engineering, API integration, automation. Leveraging AI to solve real-world problems.
about.devopsDesc: Docker, Linux, Cloudflare, Vercel. Building and maintaining scalable infrastructure.
about.automationDesc: Scripting, workflow automation, OpenClaw agent orchestration. Doing more with less.

experience1.description: Building AI-powered products and developer tools.

experience2.description: Led microservices development for high-traffic applications.

experience3.description: Built and scaled web applications from scratch.
